name: Egg Defense
short_description: 'Egg Defense' is a strategy game where players deploy units to defend against enemy eggs from portals. Units have unique skills. Every 5 stages, players upgrade character skills using selected cards. The game blends casual strategy with enjoyable action for a delightful gaming experience.
detailed_description:
"Egg Defense" is a game where players defend against eggs emerging from portals by deploying their units.

Game Features


Enemy monsters consist of eggs. Eggs emerge from portals and evolve as they move along the path, breaking shells at specific distances.
Players can deploy their units to block the eggs. Each unit has unique skills. Units gain mana by attacking, and when mana is charged, they can activate special skills.
The game offers opportunities to upgrade character skills every 5 stages. Players can choose one of three cards to upgrade character skills in that stage.
With these features, "Egg Defense" offers a casual strategy game with delightful action. Unique character designs and various battle strategies provide players with an enjoyable gaming experience.
